title: Quizify Demo — Web & Languages
description: A short sample quiz showcasing single/multi answers, code snippets, and multilingual text rendering (UTF-8).

questions.question: Which JavaScript runtime executes code outside the browser?
questions.explanation: Node.js is a JavaScript runtime built on V8 that runs JS on the server and in CLIs.

questions.question: Select all valid ways to declare a variable in modern JavaScript.
questions.explanation: `let`, `const`, and `var` all declare variables. `define` is not a JS keyword.
reduce sums the array starting from 0: 0 + 1 + 2 + 3 = 6.

questions.question: Đâu là ngôn ngữ lập trình được dùng phổ biến cho phát triển web phía trình duyệt? (Tiếng Việt)
questions.explanation: JavaScript là ngôn ngữ chạy trực tiếp trong trình duyệt để xây dựng giao diện web.

questions.question: 以下哪一项是用于样式设计的语言？(中文 / Chinese)
questions.explanation: CSS (层叠样式表) 用于描述网页的外观和布局。

questions.question: اختر لغة الترميز المستخدمة لبناء صفحات الويب. (العربية / Arabic)
questions.explanation: HTML هي لغة الترميز القياسية لإنشاء صفحات الويب.

questions.question: Which of the following are true about HTTP status codes? This question intentionally contains a very long line to verify wrapping behavior: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status?some_extremely_long_query_parameter_that_should_wrap=true&another=value
questions.explanation: 200 = OK and 404 = Not Found. 500 is Internal Server Error and 301 is Moved Permanently — the last two options swap those meanings.
